title: TritonParse Roofline Event
description: Per-launch roofline estimate for one compiled kernel. The per-CTA template (global-memory bytes from tt.load/tt.store, plus GEMM FLOPs) is computed once from TTIR, then scaled by each launch's grid and tensor arg sizes to give the total bytes moved (and FLOPs / arithmetic intensity) per launch. Achieved GB/s is intentionally omitted (needs per-launch durations not present in the trace).

hash.description: Kernel hash identifying the compiled kernel.

occurrence_id.description: Global ordering index across all events.

Roofline.description: Roofline payload: launch-invariant per-CTA template plus a per-launch breakdown.

is_gemm.description: True if the kernel contains a tt.dot (GEMM-like).

estimation_method.description: How the estimate was produced: static per-CTA TTIR template scaled per launch.

bytes_moved_per_cta.description: Per-CTA global-memory bytes from tt.load/tt.store, or null if any I/O line was unparseable (conservative).

flops_per_cta.description: Per-CTA FLOPs (2*M*N*K from the first tt.dot) for GEMM kernels, else null.

per_launch.description: One roofline entry per recorded launch of this kernel.

notes.description: Advisory notes (e.g. unknown dtype, GEMM loop caveat).

BytesBreakdown.description: Per-CTA byte split between loads and stores.

PerLaunch.description: Total bytes moved (and FLOPs / intensity) for a single launch.

launch_index.description: Global launch index (order of this launch within the rank).

occurrence_id.description: Global ordering index of the launch event, if present.

num_ctas.description: Number of CTAs (program instances) = product of grid.

bytes_moved.description: Total bytes moved by this launch: min of the IR-times-grid and arg-size estimates, or null.

bytes_from_args.description: Sum of numel*element_size over tensor args (in/out pointers counted twice).

flops.description: flops_per_cta * num_ctas for GEMM (lower bound; omits runtime reduction-loop trips), else null.

arithmetic_intensity.description: flops / bytes_moved when both are known, else null.
